---
title: "Back matter"
---

# References {.unnumbered}

The bibliography is rendered automatically from `../references.bib`. No
content needed here — Quarto handles it.

# Appendices {.unnumbered}

Optional. If you have appendices (data tables, supplementary analyses, code
listings, interview protocols), add them as `chapters/99a-appendix-X.qmd`,
`99b-appendix-Y.qmd`, etc. and reference them in `../_quarto.yml`.
